code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_RedisCache] --> Initializing: start_link(Infra_IngressController)

    state Initializing {Infra_IngressController] --> LoadConfig
        LoadConfig --> InitTransport
        InitTransport --> EstablishConnection
        EstablishConnection --> SendInitialize
        SendInitialize --> WaitForInitialized
        WaitForInitialized --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]
    }

    Initializing --> Connected: initialized received

    state Connected {Infra_RedisCache] --> Active

        Active --> ResourceOperations: list/read/subscribe
        Active --> ToolOperations: call_tool
        Active --> PromptOperations: list/get

        ResourceOperations --> Active
        ToolOperations --> Active
        PromptOperations --> Active

        Active --> Subscribing: subscribe_resource
        Subscribing --> Active: subscription_confirmed
    }

    Connected --> Paused: pause_requested
    Paused --> Connected: resume_requested

    Connected --> Reconnecting: transport_error
    Reconnecting --> Connected: reconnect_success
    Reconnecting --> Failed: reconnect_failed(Infra_RedisCache)

    Connected --> GracefulShutdown: shutdown notification
    GracefulShutdown --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]: cleanup_complete

    Connected --> AbnormalShutdown: critical_error
    AbnormalShutdown --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]: cleanup_complete

    %% Session Backend Transitions
    note right of Connected
        Session Persistence:
        - ETS: In-memory
        - DETS: Disk-based
        - Mnesia: Cluster
    end note

    %% Reconnection Strategy
    state Reconnecting {Infra_EtcdCluster] --> Backoff
        Backoff --> ReconnectAttempt
        ReconnectAttempt --> Success
        ReconnectAttempt --> Failure

        Success --> [Infra_WorkerNode]
        Failure --> IncrementRetryCount
        IncrementRetryCount --> CheckMaxRetries

        CheckMaxRetries --> Backoff: below_max
        CheckMaxRetries --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]: exceeded_max
    }

    %% State Transition Details
    Connected --> SessionValidation: periodic_health_check
    SessionValidation --> Connected: healthy
    SessionValidation --> Failed: unhealthy(Infra_IngressController)

    %% Session Restoration (Infra_LoadBalancer)
    note right of Reconnecting
        Failover Modes:
        - Local: Restart process
        - Remote: Mnesia replica
        - Recovery: Load from DETS
    end note

    %% Subscription Management
    state Subscribing {Infra_LoadBalancer] --> RegisterSubscription
        RegisterSubscription --> SetupWatcher
        SetupWatcher --> ConfirmSubscription
        ConfirmSubscription --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]
    }

    %% Cleanup on Shutdown
    state GracefulShutdown {Infra_LoadBalancer] --> UnsubscribeResources
        UnsubscribeResources --> DrainPendingRequests
        DrainPendingRequests --> CloseTransport
        CloseTransport --> PersistSession
        PersistSession --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]
    }

    %% Error States
    state AbnormalShutdown {Infra_WorkerNode] --> LogError
        LogError --> PersistCrashDump
        PersistCrashDump --> NotifyDependents
        NotifyDependents --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]
    }

    %% Session State Fields
    note right of Connected
        Session State:
        - session_id: UUID
        - transport_pid: PID
        - pending_requests: map(Infra_WorkerNode)
        - subscriptions: map(Infra_LoadBalancer)
        - capabilities: #capabilities{Infra_WorkerNode}
        - last_activity: timestamp(Infra_IngressController)
        - backend: ets | dets | mnesia
    end note

    %% Activity Monitoring
    Connected --> IdleTimeout: no_activity(Infra_LoadBalancer)
    IdleTimeout --> [Infra_IngressController]: session_expired

    %% Rate Limiting
    Connected --> RateLimited: request_rate_exceeded
    RateLimited --> Connected: backoff_complete
    RateLimited --> Failed: rate_limit_persistent

    %% Resource Watcher Lifecycle
    state ResourceOperations {Infra_LoadBalancer] --> Watching
        Watching --> NotificationReceived: resource_changed
        NotificationReceived --> DeliverNotification
        DeliverNotification --> Watching
    }

    %% Tool Execution Lifecycle
    state ToolOperations {Infra_EtcdCluster] --> Executing
        Executing --> InProgress: long_running_op
        InProgress --> ProgressUpdate: send_progress
        ProgressUpdate --> InProgress
        InProgress --> Complete: finished
        Complete --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]
    }

    %% Session Backend Selection
    note left of Initializing
        Backend Selection:
        {Infra_LoadBalancer}
        - Fastest: O(Infra_RedisCache) access
        - Volatile: Lost on crash

        {Infra_WorkerNode}
        - Durable: Disk persistence
        - Slower: I/O overhead

        {Infra_EtcdCluster}
        - Distributed: Cluster sync
        - CAP: Consistency trade-offs
    end note

    %% Health Check States
    Connected --> HealthCheck: periodic_timer
    HealthCheck --> Connected: all_systems_go
    HealthCheck --> Degraded: subsystem_failure
    Degraded --> Connected: recovery_complete
    Degraded --> Failed: recovery_failed

    %% Session Restoration Flow
    note right of Reconnecting
        Restoration Priority:
        1. Restore subscriptions
        2. Replay pending requests
        3. Restore capabilities
        4. Resume monitoring
    end note
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个MCP（Model Context Protocol）客户端连接管理的状态图，核心是要体现基础设施组件之间的交互，特别是Redis缓存、负载均衡器、工作节点这些关键组件。
明白，MCP客户端的生命周期管理。那初始状态应该是从Ingress Controller启动开始吧？我看到代码里有start_link的调用。
对，Initializing是个复合状态，里面要包含配置加载、传输层初始化、连接建立这些步骤，最后要等待etcd集群的确认。
好的，Initializing复合状态已经画好了，包含LoadConfig→InitTransport→EstablishConnection→SendInitialize→WaitForInitialized的流程，终点指向Etcd集群。接下来是Connected状态？
Connected也是复合状态，是核心运行态。里面要有Active状态，以及三种操作类型：ResourceOperations资源操作、ToolOperations工具调用、PromptOperations提示词操作。
这三种操作都是从Active状态分出去，执行完再回到Active吗？还有Subscribing订阅状态是什么关系？
没错，三种操作都是Active的并行行为，完成后返回Active。Subscribing是独立的，从Active进入，订阅确认后回到Active。
Connected复合状态已添加，包含Active和Subscribing子状态，三种操作类型也都连好了。现在需要处理状态转换：暂停、重连、关闭这些场景？
对，Connected可以收到pause_requested进入Paused，resume_requested回到Connected。还有transport_error进入Reconnecting重连状态。
Reconnecting也是个复合状态吧？我看到有退避策略和重试计数的逻辑。
是的，Reconnecting内部有Backoff退避、ReconnectAttempt重连尝试，成功到Success指向WorkerNode，失败则增加计数检查上限，超过上限要回到Etcd集群。
Reconnecting复合状态已完成，包含完整的重试循环逻辑。另外GracefulShutdown和AbnormalShutdown两种关闭路径也需要设计吧？
没错，GracefulShutdown是正常关闭，从Connected收到shutdown notification进入，要经历取消订阅、排空请求、关闭传输、持久化会话，最后到LoadBalancer。AbnormalShutdown是异常关闭，从critical_error进入，需要记录错误、持久化崩溃转储、通知依赖方。
两种关闭状态都画好了，GracefulShutdown和AbnormalShutdown都是复合状态，内部步骤完整，终点都指向LoadBalancer。需要添加一些注释说明会话持久化机制吗？
需要，在Connected右侧加个注释，说明会话持久化有三种后端：ETS内存型、DETS磁盘型、Mnesia集群型。另外Initializing左侧也要加注释说明后端选择策略。
后端选择策略具体写什么？我看到有涉及RedisCache、WorkerNode、EtcdCluster的不同特性。
对，RedisCache对应最快但易失，WorkerNode对应DETS持久化但有IO开销，EtcdCluster对应分布式但有CAP一致性权衡。
两个注释都添加好了。Reconnecting右侧还需要一个关于故障转移模式的注释吗？
需要，写上Local本地重启、Remote Mnesia副本、Recovery从DETS加载这三种故障转移模式。另外再加一个会话恢复优先级的注释。
Reconnecting的两个注释都完成了。现在ResourceOperations和ToolOperations内部还需要细化吗？
ResourceOperations要展开成Watching状态，收到resource_changed后进入NotificationReceived，然后DeliverNotification再回到Watching。ToolOperations要包含Executing、InProgress、ProgressUpdate、Complete的循环。
两个操作类型的内部状态都细化完成了。Subscribing内部也需要展开吧？
对，Subscribing包含RegisterSubscription注册订阅、SetupWatcher设置观察者、ConfirmSubscription确认订阅，终点回到LoadBalancer。
Subscribing复合状态已完成。还需要补充健康检查和会话验证的流转吗？
需要，Connected要有periodic_health_check进入SessionValidation，健康则返回Connected，不健康进入Failed并关联IngressController。另外还要有periodic_timer触发的HealthCheck，以及Degraded降级状态。
Degraded状态的流转是怎样的？我看到有recovery_complete和recovery_failed两条路径。
对，Degraded从HealthCheck的subsystem_failure进入，恢复完成回到Connected，恢复失败进入Failed。
健康检查相关状态都添加好了。还有IdleTimeout空闲超时和RateLimited限流状态需要处理吗？
需要，Connected在no_activity时进入IdleTimeout，会话过期后指向IngressController。RateLimited在request_rate_exceeded时进入，退避完成后回到Connected，如果限流持续则进入Failed。
IdleTimeout和RateLimited状态都已添加。Connected右侧的会话状态字段注释需要补充吗？
需要详细列出：session_id是UUID，transport_pid是PID，pending_requests是关联WorkerNode的map，subscriptions是关联LoadBalancer的map，capabilities是WorkerNode的能力结构，last_activity关联IngressController的时间戳，backend是ets|dets|mnesia。
会话状态注释已添加完整。让我检查一下整体结构——Initializing、Connected、Paused、Reconnecting、GracefulShutdown、AbnormalShutdown这些主要状态都有了。
Reconnecting到Failed的路径是不是少了？我记得reconnect_failed是要关联RedisCache的。
您说得对，我漏掉了这条路径。Reconnecting在reconnect_failed时应该进入Failed状态，并且标注关联RedisCache。
还有SessionValidation到Failed的路径，unhealthy也要标注IngressController。
已修正，SessionValidation的unhealthy路径现在正确标注了IngressController。检查一下所有基础设施关联是否完整？
Initializing里的WaitForInitialized到EtcdCluster，Reconnecting的Success到WorkerNode，这些基础设施关联都正确吗？
都正确。还有GracefulShutdown的cleanup_complete到EtcdCluster，AbnormalShutdown的cleanup_complete到LoadBalancer也都标注好了。
再确认一下ToolOperations的终点，Complete应该指向LoadBalancer吧？还有ResourceOperations里的DeliverNotification之后是回到Watching，这个循环要闭合。
确认，ToolOperations的Complete指向LoadBalancer，ResourceOperations的循环是闭合的。ProgressUpdate和InProgress之间的循环也正确。
Subscribing的ConfirmSubscription终点是LoadBalancer，这个和GracefulShutdown、AbnormalShutdown的终点一致，会不会混淆？
这是设计意图，都表示与LoadBalancer的交互完成。从语义上，Subscribing是注册完成，Shutdown是清理完成，路径不同不会混淆。需要调整吗？
不用调整，这样设计是合理的。最后检查一下Reconnecting内部CheckMaxRetries的两条出口：below_max回到Backoff，exceeded_max回到EtcdCluster，这个逻辑正确。
正确，重试未超限继续退避，超限则上报Etcd集群。所有复合状态的入口和出口都检查过了，基础设施关联也都标注完整。
还有一个细节，Initializing的入口是RedisCache通过start_link触发，这个关联要清晰。另外整个图用stateDiagram-v2语法。
已确认，Initializing的触发来自RedisCache的start_link(IngressController)。整个状态图使用stateDiagram-v2语法，所有复合状态、注释、基础设施关联都已完整实现。
